title: Custom component-embed node (placeholder slot, no live preview yet)
description: Build the `component-embed` Tiptap node as a placeholder in this phase: it reserves the slot with a `componentName`/`variantId` attribute pair and renders a static placeholder box, without an actual live iframe preview (that lands in TASK-47).
acceptanceCriteria: A custom Tiptap `Node` extension `componentEmbed` is registered as an atomic (non-editable-content) block node
Node has `componentName: string` and `variantId: string | null` attributes
Toolbar provides an 'insert component embed' action that inserts the node with `componentName: ''` and `variantId: null` (selection UI for a real component/variant lands in TASK-48)
NodeView renders a clearly-labeled placeholder box (e.g. 'Component preview placeholder — select a component') when `componentName` is empty
`editor.getJSON()` output for this node matches the `ComponentEmbedBlockContent` shape defined in TASK-3

steps.details: Create `apps/admin/src/features/editor/nodes/ComponentEmbed.ts` extending `Node.create({ name: 'componentEmbed', group: 'block', atom: true, ... })` with `componentName` and `variantId` attrs.
Implement a React NodeView rendering a dashed-border box with a placeholder label and an icon, showing `componentName` if set, or a call-to-action to select one if empty.
Add a toolbar button inserting `{ type: 'componentEmbed', attrs: { componentName: '', variantId: null } }` at the cursor position.
Confirm the node's JSON shape matches `ComponentEmbedBlockContent` in `packages/schema/src/block.ts`.
Using Playwright: insert a component-embed placeholder, confirm it renders the empty-state placeholder box, and confirm `editor.getJSON()` reflects the correct node type and attrs.

technicalNotes: Deliberately no iframe or network call here — this task only reserves the slot in the editor's node schema. Real rendering is layered on top of this same node in TASK-47 without changing its JSON shape, so persisted content created in Fase 3 remains valid once Fase 5 ships.
